_comment: Brilliant Void (玄虚) — Renegade Immortal. Canon confidence: 5/5. Prime Directive: this beast exists objectively whether the player has the perception to recognize it.
name: Brilliant Void

canonical.appearance: A mysterious void beast that Wang Lin obtained. Existence spans between reality and void. Can teleport through spatial cracks.

inner_dan_properties.alchemy_use: Brilliant Void core refines Spatial Rift Pills; enables void-attribute breakthrough materials
inner_dan_properties.canon_note: Wang Lin's bonded void beast; its core bridges reality and void

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
